description: A client reviews a change order and rejects it due to the high cost.

nodes.task_description: Receive the client's rejection of the change order, noting the reason 'Cost too high'.

expected_outcome.value: The rejection is logged in the system.

nodes.task_description: Update the status of the change order to 'Rejected' in the project management system.

expected_outcome.value: The change order status is updated.

nodes.task_description: Notify the project team that the added scope will not be proceeding.

expected_outcome.value: The project team is informed not to perform the work in the rejected change order.
